steps.title: Spot the passage's defining claim
steps.content: The passage's final sentence reveals what vocal manipulation accomplishes: it “invites the listener to reflect on the extent to which digital technology mediates the human experience today.” This is the passage's central claim about the manipulation's purpose.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the answer choices
steps.content:
Choice C—a commentary on contemporary social conditions—directly captures what the passage claims the manipulation does: it prompts reflection on technology's role in shaping modern experience.

The other three either introduce “negative” as unsupported (A), invoke historical continuity absent from the text (B), or shift focus to music's influence on listeners' sense of self (D).

This matches choice C — C is correct.
